svg.text: Lv2 Tiefling Wizard | HP 10 | AC 10 (13 Mage Armor) | Spell DC 13 | Spell Atk +5 | 3 x 1st-lvl slots
BEFORE COMBAT - cast MAGE ARMOR (8 hr, AC 13). Always start a fight with it up.
Find Familiar (ritual, no slot): summon an Owl ahead of time - Help = free advantage, Flyby = no OA.
Tasha's Hideous Laughter: 1 FREE cast / long rest - spend the freebie before burning a slot.
Fragile at HP 10 - keep Mage Armor up, save 1 slot for Shield. Darkvision 60ft. Fire resistance.
Synced: 2026-06-01 - Lv2 - regenerate from D&D Beyond after level-ups
